title: Electric work machine with flat-shaped substrate for accommodating light emitter
abstract: An electric work machine can be compact. An electric work machine includes a motor, a tool holder rotatable with a rotational force generated by the motor, a substrate, a first light emitter including a first light-emitting element on a front surface of the substrate, and a second light emitter including a second light-emitting element on a back surface of the substrate.
claims: 1. An electric work machine, comprising: a motor; a tool holder rotatable with a rotational force generated by the motor; a flat-shaped substrate; a first light emitter including a first light-emitting element on a front surface of the substrate; and a second light emitter including a second light-emitting element on a back surface of the substrate.
